mapper.select: SELECT id, conversation_id, role, content, tokens, created_at FROM messages WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} ORDER BY created_at ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO messages (conversation_id, role, content, tokens) VALUES (#{conversationId}, #{role}, #{content}, #{tokens})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId}
